sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14083" key="a)potomeu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποτομ-εύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0376.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:151" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.151</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
